notes: Regression fixture for the Oakwood Scotland RTF-in-.DOC instruction letter (collisionspike TKT-086 sample). VERIFIED FINDING (2026-07-09): neither the letter nor its carrier email contains an accident-circumstances narrative — the letter carries only 'Accident: <date>' and the email only a vehicle-status advisory (total loss / unroadworthy). accident_circumstances is therefore PINNED EMPTY: the correct extraction is no narrative, never junk; the corpus-wide gap is measured by the TKT-086 coverage report instead.
